title: Danilarious Star Atlas
description: A generated catalog of starred GitHub repositories, grouped into stable categories.

categories.title: AI & Agents
categories.description: LLM apps, agent frameworks, inference stacks, model tooling, prompting workflows, and AI-native products.

categories.title: Developer Tools
categories.description: Editors, IDE extensions, language servers, linters, generators, and tools that improve day-to-day software development.

categories.title: Frontend & UI
categories.description: User interfaces, component systems, static sites, dashboards, design-system implementations, and browser-first applications.

categories.title: Content, CMS & Docs
categories.description: Static site generators, CMS stacks, documentation systems, markdown pipelines, and content-oriented web tooling.

categories.title: Backend & APIs
categories.description: Servers, APIs, service layers, webhooks, auth-capable backends, and infrastructure that primarily exposes application functionality.

categories.title: DevOps & Infra
categories.description: Containers, CI/CD, infrastructure-as-code, self-hosting, deployment pipelines, and observability or operations tooling.

categories.title: Data & Analytics
categories.description: Databases, ETL, analytics stacks, warehouses, notebooks, metrics pipelines, and tools for structured data work.

categories.title: Design & Themes
categories.description: Design assets, theme packs, iconography, typography, motion systems, and visual exploration or presentation tools.

categories.title: CLI & Terminal
categories.description: Shell tools, terminal utilities, command-line workflows, text UIs, and scripts meant to be driven primarily from a console.

categories.title: Learning & Reference
categories.description: Tutorials, example projects, awesome-lists, notes, roadmaps, boilerplates, and repositories intended primarily for learning or reference.

categories.title: Misc
categories.description: Everything that still does not fit the taxonomy cleanly after the more specific buckets have been applied.
